question_text: Chest pain or chest pressure now?
Sweating, nausea, or vomiting with pain?
History of heart disease (CAD/MI/stent) or stroke?
Known aortic aneurysm or connective tissue disorder?
Pain reproducible with pressing on chest wall?
Feeling heart racing or skipping beats?
Known thyroid disease or weight loss/heat intolerance?
History of heart disease or prior arrhythmia?
Very high blood pressure reading recently?
New kidney symptoms (very low urine) or swelling?
Known heart disease, stroke, or kidney disease?
Able to recheck BP after resting 5-10 minutes?
